untranslatable_reason: The signal requires tracking of swing extremes (swing highs/lows) and measuring absolute point moves between extremes (e.g., swing high 1185.53 to new low 1159.71 = 25.82 points). No swing extreme tracking or absolute point-based reversal threshold indicator exists in the allowed indicator list. The reversal_criterion_points parameter is marked AUTHOR_SILENT with only an example value provided. This requires custom swing tracking logic not available in standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to express the reversal concept using price extremes (prev_high/prev_low comparisons), but this is a simplified approximation. A proper Kaufman reversal detector requires: (1) explicit swing high/low identification across multiple bars, (2) tracking of the previous swing extreme value, and (3) comparison of price breach distance in absolute points against a configurable threshold. The example shows ~25.82 point moves, but without the exact reversal_criterion_points value and without swing tracking indicators, a precise translation is not possible.
